# SkillPack

> Curated AI agent skill bundles for Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and Continue.dev. One install command per platform.

SkillPack aggregates 110,000+ AI agent skills from GitHub and skills.sh, categorizes them by developer role, and serves them as curated bundles. Developers describe their role and get a single install command that adds the best skills to their AI coding assistant.

## What SkillPack Does

- Indexes 110,000+ AI agent skills from GitHub and 6 other sources
- Provides 62+ curated role-based and task-based bundles (frontend, backend, devops, ml-ai, security, etc.)
- Generates one-line install commands for Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and Continue.dev
- Uses Groq LLM-powered curation to match skills to bundles by relevance

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://skillpack.dev - search by role, get matched bundle
- Explore: https://skillpack.dev/explore - browse all bundles and skills
- Bundle pages: https://skillpack.dev/bundle/[slug] - role or task bundle with install command
- Skill pages: https://skillpack.dev/skills/[owner/repo] - individual skill detail

## Supported Platforms

- Claude Code (npx skills add)
- Cursor (.cursorrules)
- GitHub Copilot (.github/copilot-instructions.md)
- Continue.dev (~/.continue/skills/)
- Universal (bash script)

## Bundle Categories

Role bundles: frontend, backend, fullstack, devops, ml-ai, security, database, testing, react-developer, python-developer, nodejs-developer, nextjs-developer, and more.

Task bundles: setup-auth, add-payments, setup-docker, setup-cicd, write-unit-tests, design-rest-api, setup-database, build-saas, build-chatbot, optimize-performance, and more.

## Contact

- Website: https://skillpack.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/skillpack-dev/skillpack
